languages.text: "Почему ты носишь черные одеяния? Разве не все техножрецы носят красное?"
"Why do you wear black robes? Don't all Tech-Priests wear red?"
languages.original_text: "Почему ты носишь черные одеяния? Разве не все техножрецы носят красное?"

traits.locale_text: "Why do you wear black robes? Don't all Tech-Priests wear red?"
"Why do you wear black robes? Don't all Tech-Priests wear red?"
"Why do you wear black robes? Don't all Tech-Priests wear red?"

languages.text: «¿Por qué lleva túnica negra? ¿No van de rojo todos los tecnosacerdotes?».
languages.original_text: "Why do you wear black robes? Don't all Tech-Priests wear red?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Por qué lleva túnica negra? ¿No van de rojo todos los tecnosacerdotes?».

languages.text: “你怎么穿黑袍？技术神甫不都穿红袍吗？”
languages.original_text: "Why do you wear black robes? Don't all Tech-Priests wear red?"

traits.locale_text: “你怎么穿黑袍？技术神甫不都穿红袍吗？”

languages.text: « Pourquoi portez-vous une robe noire ? Les technoprêtres ne sont-ils pas tous censés porter du rouge ? »
languages.original_text: "Why do you wear black robes? Don't all Tech-Priests wear red?"

traits.locale_text: « Pourquoi portez-vous une robe noire ? Les technoprêtres ne sont-ils pas tous censés porter du rouge ? »

languages.text: "Warum tragt Ihr schwarze Roben? Tragen nicht alle Techpriester Rot?"
languages.original_text: "Why do you wear black robes? Don't all Tech-Priests wear red?"

traits.locale_text: "Warum tragt Ihr schwarze Roben? Tragen nicht alle Techpriester Rot?"

languages.text: 「なぜ黒いローブを着ているのだ？技術司祭はみな赤いローブを着ているのではないのか？」
languages.original_text: "Why do you wear black robes? Don't all Tech-Priests wear red?"

traits.locale_text: 「なぜ黒いローブを着ているのだ？技術司祭はみな赤いローブを着ているのではないのか？」

languages.text: "Neden siyah cübbe giyiyorsun? Tüm Tekno Rahipler kırmızı giymez mi?"
languages.original_text: "Why do you wear black robes? Don't all Tech-Priests wear red?"

traits.locale_text: "Neden siyah cübbe giyiyorsun? Tüm Tekno Rahipler kırmızı giymez mi?"
